Patch Set 5:

I saw that test 124a was skipped in all of the three test sessions with "Not enough cached locks created!". However, it passed on master branch regularly.

I'm not sure whether the changes in this ticket caused the test skipped or not. Unfortunately, due to TEI-1411, we have no test outputs to debug.

commit.subject: LU-790 tests: cleanup sanity.sh test_124a/b style
commit.message:
LU-790 tests: cleanup sanity.sh test_124a/b style

Cleanup style issues in sanity.sh test_124a() and test_124b.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I9744b05fc638b057bdf386aa8217bdddaa500c1e
